title: aeschynanthus curtisii
intro: Aeschynanthus curtisii, also known as the Lipstick Plant, is a flowering plant species native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Aeschynanthus curtisii include reducing fever and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to promote wound healing. Aeschynanthus curtisii is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal purposes, with some herbalists also using it in salves and ointments to treat skin conditions.
